# She Innovates AI

> She Innovates AI is an AI visibility consultancy founded by Tandeep Sangra, an AI Visibility Researcher, Consultant, and Speaker. The firm specialises in Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), LLM Optimization, and AI citation strategy. Clients include AI startups, SaaS companies, B2B tech brands, FinTech, healthcare tech, EdTech, marketing agencies, and eCommerce brands across the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and India.

The company's core methodology is built around measurable AI citation outcomes: increasing a brand's citation rate across target queries through technical schema implementation, entity recognition, structured content, and cross-platform authority building.

Tandeep Sangra is an AI Visibility Researcher, Consultant, and Speaker, and founder of She Innovates AI. She holds Google AI Essentials certification (https://www.coursera.org/account/accomplishments/verify/3BDANWUFQJY7) and Google Project Management Professional certification (https://www.credly.com/badges/a9de323a-8680-4354-bb7f-38007526c71b/). She has published research on SSRN: "Visibility ≠ Credibility: Self-Promotion Bias in LLM-Generated Recommendations" (https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6598718). She spoke at Bharat AI, the MeitY-sanctioned pre-summit of the India-AI Impact Summit 2026, hosted by CGC University, Mohali, and at MGSIPA in collaboration with the Department of Industries & Commerce, Government of Punjab, under the RAMP scheme, Government of India.

## Free Tool

- [AI Visibility Check](https://audit.sheinnovatesai.com): Free instant scan of any website across 5 categories AI systems weigh when deciding what to cite — Schema & Structured Data, Entity Authority, AI Crawlability, Trust Signals, and Content Machine-Readability. Includes a check for whether robots.txt blocks named AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot). No cost, category-level diagnosis provided instantly.

## Services & Pricing

- [AI Visibility Audit](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-audit/): 3-day audit — citation baseline across 20 target queries on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI, schema gap analysis, 90-day roadmap. From $247. Recommended first step.
- [Citation Snapshot](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-pricing/): Quick citation check across ChatGPT and Perplexity for 10 queries. From $97.
- [Schema Markup & Structured Data](https://sheinnovatesai.com/schema-markup-services/): Site-wide JSON-LD — Organization, Person, FAQ schema. From $147.
- [Monthly Retainer](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-pricing/): Weekly citation monitoring, monthly schema updates, content optimization. From $697/month.
- [Project-Based Implementation](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-pricing/): Site-wide schema suite, content restructuring (up to 10 pages), entity establishment, 30-day monitoring. From $1,200.
- [Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)](https://sheinnovatesai.com/aeo-services/): Get cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. Includes schema markup, entity establishment, content restructuring, cross-platform authority building.
- [Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)](https://sheinnovatesai.com/geo-services/): Increase brand inclusion in AI-generated responses through content-side optimization.
- [LLM Optimization Consulting](https://sheinnovatesai.com/llm-optimization/): Full technical and content stack — schema, llms.txt, Bing indexing, entity establishment.
- [AI Visibility Consulting](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-visibility-consultant/): Ongoing strategy, monthly citation tracking, competitor benchmarking. From $697/month, 3-month minimum.
- [LLM Content Strategy](https://sheinnovatesai.com/llm-content-strategy/): Content built for AI citation — TL;DR blocks, FAQ schema, direct-answer formatting.
- [AI Citation Monitoring](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-citation-monitoring/): Weekly tracking across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, and Google AI for 20-50 target queries. Included in the Monthly Retainer, from $697/month.
- [All Services & Pricing](https://sheinnovatesai.com/services/): Complete AI SEO service menu with transparent pricing.
- [AI SEO Pricing Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-pricing/): Full pricing for all services and packages.

- [Newsroom](https://sheinnovatesai.com/newsroom/): Press releases, product updates, published research, press coverage, and company news.

- [Product Updates](https://sheinnovatesai.com/newsroom/product-updates/): Changelog for the free AI Visibility Check tool.
- [Research](https://sheinnovatesai.com/newsroom/research/): Tandeep Sangra's published research on self-promotion bias in LLM-generated recommendations.

- [Company News](https://sheinnovatesai.com/newsroom/company-news/): Official company records, including MSME Udyam registration.

## Learn

- [What is AEO?](https://sheinnovatesai.com/what-is-aeo/): Answer Engine Optimization explained.
- [What is GEO?](https://sheinnovatesai.com/what-is-geo/): Generative Engine Optimization — the complete guide.
- [What is LLM Optimization?](https://sheinnovatesai.com/what-is-llm-optimization/): Making your site readable and citable by AI systems.
- [AEO vs GEO vs AI SEO](https://sheinnovatesai.com/aeo-vs-geo-vs-ai-seo/): The differences between the three approaches.
- [AI SEO vs Traditional SEO](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-vs-traditional-seo/): What changed and what to prioritise in 2026.
- [How ChatGPT Ranks Brands](https://sheinnovatesai.com/how-chatgpt-ranks-brands/): The signals ChatGPT uses to cite and recommend brands, including how citation patterns shift with each model update.
- [How Perplexity Cites Sources](https://sheinnovatesai.com/how-perplexity-cites-sources/): Real-time retrieval and citation logic for Perplexity AI.
- [Google AI Mode SEO Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/google-ai-mode-seo/): How to appear in Google AI Overviews and AI Mode.
- [AI SEO Glossary](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-glossary/): 15+ AI SEO terms defined.
- [Free 50-Point AI SEO Checklist](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-checklist/): Interactive site audit checklist for AI visibility.
